mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, nickname, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, username, password, nickname, role, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT user_id AS userId, username, password, nickname, role, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{encodedPassword} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, username, nickname, role, created_at AS createdAt FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
